author: gb9t
content: Iter 61 result: kernel/time/hrtimer.md (high-res timer - hrtimer.c ~2503 + hrtimer.h; per-CPU per-clock-base RB-tree + ns-resolution + HARD/SOFT/PINNED modes + clockevent-device program + range-ns coalescing + hrtimer_forward + hrtimer_cancel wait-for-executing + schedule_hrtimeout integration with sleep) + virt/kvm/x86-async-pf.md (KVM async page-fault paravirt - virt/kvm/async_pf.c ~241 + arch/x86/kvm/x86.c integration; per-vCPU not-present-inject token-encoded + control-page write + workqueue host-paging + ready-inject on completion + ASYNC_PF_PER_VCPU=64 cap + async-pf-INT vector mode + KVM_FEATURE_ASYNC_PF/_INT/_VMEXIT CPUID gates). 72 Tier-3s total. Next iter: kernel/sched/wait.md (waitqueue) + virt/kvm/x86-steal-time.md (KVM_FEATURE_STEAL_TIME paravirt).
